description_long: This is a streamlined drag racing motorcycle with an elongated chassis and extended rear wheelie bars, designed for high-speed straight-line performance. The body is predominantly metallic gray with red accents and features a low, aerodynamic profile, including a covered rear wheel and a partially enclosed engine area. The front wheel is exposed, and the handlebars are low and straight, optimized for racing ergonomics. Sponsor decals and racing numbers are visible on the side panels, indicating its use in competitive events. The rear section is reinforced and features a large, single rear wheel, with the wheelie bars extending far behind to prevent flipping during rapid acceleration. The overall build is robust, with a focus on minimizing air resistance and maximizing stability at high speeds.
description: A metallic gray drag racing motorcycle with extended wheelie bars, low handlebars, and racing decals, built for high-speed straight-line performance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, exposed front wheel, and low handlebars.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated chassis, sponsor decals, covered rear wheel, and extended wheelie bars.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide rear tire, wheelie bars, and streamlined tail section.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible racing decals, aerodynamic bodywork, and extended wheelie bars.
